title: Dungeon & Mob
description: Exploration/Dungeon + Building Modpack for better feelings to be home.
body:
**Welcome** Adventurer in **_Dungeon & Mob_**,

_We of the Council have placed you in a blank canvas world to start anew journey, We will be watching from the heavens._
 
Enjoyable pack of fantasy realm!


---
FEATURES
- ✔️ Explore over new biomes [In The Overworld, The Nether & The END]
- ✔️ A Bunch of New Dungeons &  New Structures
- ✔️ New Mods to bring life to your world [Much more content to explore!]
- ✔️ A Brand New Experience of Vanilla Minecraft

---
<details>
<summary>Click me!</summary>
Goal - 10k downloads: custom own content
</details>
